name: Neon Challenge Legends
author: Poki
description: Neon Challenge Legends is an arcade game that challenges you to finish the level without dying using your reflexes to guide your little monster to the finish line. Perfect for players who love a challenge! Dodge spikes, rotating obstacles and walls to stay safe. You can even use slides to gain momentum. Earn enough coins to unlock cool new skins for your character. Every level has 3 stars that you can collect, placed in tricky spots. Can you collect them all? How do I play Neon Challenge Legends? Move Up: Hold the W, up arrow key, spacebar or left mouse click Move Down: Release the W, uparrow, spacebar or left mouse click Restart: Use the R key Who created Neon Challenge Legends? Neon Challenge Legends is created by Jungle Tavern. Play their other games on Poki: ! How can I play Neon Challenge Legends for free? You can play Neon Challenge Legends for free on Poki. Can I play Neon Challenge Legends on mobile devices and desktop? Neon Challenge Legends can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
